flagshipEvents.name: AvionX
flagshipEvents.description: An exciting aerospace challenge that blends analytical thinking with engineering creativity. The event begins with an interactive problem-solving round testing logic, adaptability, and teamwork. It then moves into a technical stage where ideas are converted into structured designs under realistic aerospace constraints. Precision, innovation, and collaboration define the experience.

flagshipEvents.name: Brand-IT
flagshipEvents.description: Welcome to Brand It, where innovation meets strategy! Teams will craft a brand from scratch, creating logos, color palettes, product visuals, and packaging designs. Stand out by presenting impactful promotional materials in this exciting multi-day battle of creativity and competition. Get ready to build, brand, and shine like a pro!

flagshipEvents.name: Civicture
flagshipEvents.description: Civicture is an immersive platform for future-tech engineering and innovation. It begins with a concept challenge where participants present bold ideas using emerging technologies. The event then moves into a detailed engineering and system design phase, transforming ideas into precise technical models and futuristic solutions. Be part of building tomorrow’s technology-driven world!

flagshipEvents.name: CodeStorm
flagshipEvents.description: CODESTORM is a flagship coding competition focused on logical thinking and code optimization through structured rounds of increasing difficulty. Participants solve challenging problems that build efficient programming skills essential for engineering tomorrow’s technology.

flagshipEvents.name: Hack-A-Maze
flagshipEvents.description: Dive into Hack-A-Maze, an adrenaline-packed challenge that tasks you with building a self-driven obstacle bot to conquer mazes on its own and the quickest escape claims victory!

flagshipEvents.name: Laser Tag
flagshipEvents.description: Step into the battlefield with Laser Tag, a high-energy combat arena where strategy, speed, and teamwork decide the winner. Gear up, lock targets, and outsmart your opponents in an tactical face-off—only the sharpest shooters and smartest tacticians will dominate the arena.

flagshipEvents.name: Mechronins
flagshipEvents.description: This lively three-round event blends mechanical quizzes, creative thinking, and presentations into an experience that keeps you involved from start to finish. Sharpen your ideas, step into the challenge, and let your engineering instincts take the lead.

flagshipEvents.name: Mock Placements
flagshipEvents.description: Mock placement closely resemble actual corporate recruitment processes. By simulating real interviews, they help candidates understand expectations and improve their performance through expert feedback. Participants also have the flexibility to choose their preferred domain, allowing them to tailor the experience to their career aspirations and strengths. An opportunity exclusively available to the students of UVCE!

flagshipEvents.name: Silic-O-Hack
flagshipEvents.description: Silic-O-Hack is a flagship simulated hardware hackathon that challenges participants to solve real-world problems using creativity, logic, and electronics skills. Shortlisted teams design, simulate, and present innovative circuit-based solutions using TinkerCAD, highlighting technical excellence and practical innovation.

flagshipEvents.name: Summit
flagshipEvents.description: Summit is a flagship event for students that provides a formal platform for thoughtful discussions. Participants collaborate to design impactful and practical solutions, sharpening their problem-solving and leadership skills. The event inspires socially responsible thinking and empowers students to become effective agents of change.

generalEvents.name: CTRL+Z
generalEvents.description: CTRL+Z is a unique event where participants use ChatGPT to solve challenging questions. The goal is simple ask better, think smarter, and generate the best possible answer!

generalEvents.name: Design Disaster
generalEvents.description: Design Disaster is a creative UI/UX challenge where participants intentionally break design rules and then turn the chaos into accessible user experiences.

generalEvents.name: IPL Auction
generalEvents.description: Step into the shoes of a team owner and experience the thrill of live bidding! With a fixed budget in hand, strategize and compete to build your dream squad. Face intense rounds that test your cricket knowledge and decision-making skills. Only the smartest team will create the ultimate championship lineup!

generalEvents.name: Project 2049
generalEvents.description: Project 2049 is a fun event where the team will design their own sci-fi gadget on PC and make their own rules about the science behind it's working, and will participate in a high energy debate challenging other team's ideas and defending your own.

generalEvents.name: Prompt & Pursuit
generalEvents.description: Step into the world of CRM innovation where strategy meets automation! Prompt & Pursuit challenges teams to solve real-time business problems using data, AI logic, and workflow design. From building digital CRM blueprints to pitching in a Shark Tank style finale with a surprise crisis twist, this event is where future business technologists rise.

generalEvents.name: Quiz O'Clock
generalEvents.description: Stay ahead of the curve with Quiz O'Clock, a fast-paced trivia event covering the latest breakthroughs in Engineering and IT. We bridge the gap between core programming and modern tech current affairs. Whether it's legacy code or next-gen innovation, show us you have the engineering mindset to win.

generalEvents.name: Tech Tambola
generalEvents.description: Tech Tambola is an interactive, knowledge-based twist on the traditional tambola game designed for engineering and technology enthusiasts. Instead of numbers, participants mark technical and general science concepts based on clue-based calls. The event combines awareness, quick thinking, and strategy to create an engaging and competitive experience.

generalEvents.name: ತಂತ್ರಜ್ಞಾನ ತರ್ಕ 2.0
generalEvents.description: ತಂತ್ರಜ್ಞಾನ ತರ್ಕ 2.0 is a fun event that combines Kannada language and technology. It includes a Kannada skill-based written round and an exciting debate on technology and heritage. Participate in teams, test your skills, win cash prizes and certificates.

gamingEvents.name: BGMI
gamingEvents.description: Join our exciting Online BGMI Tournament, where squads from across the region compete in high-intensity battle royale action. Players will battle it out in multiple rounds, showcasing their skills, strategy, and teamwork for a chance to win cash prizes, exclusive rewards, and ultimate glory. Register now and prove your dominance on the battleground!

gamingEvents.name: CHESSFRENZY
gamingEvents.description: Chessfrenzy is a fast-paced chess showdown blending strategy, speed, and blitz tactics for ultimate brain gamers. Battle through intense rounds, outsmart opponents, and claim chessboard glory. Ideal for tacticians ready to unleash their inner grandmaster!

gamingEvents.name: Free Fire MAX
gamingEvents.description: Step into the ultimate survival battleground where strategy, reflexes, and skill decide the champion. Land on the island, loot weapons, and outlast your opponents in fast-paced combat as the safe zone closes in. Adapt quickly and prove your dominance.

gamingEvents.name: VALORANT
gamingEvents.description: Valorant is an online multiplayer computer game, produced by Riot Games. It is a first-person shooter game, consisting of two teams of five, where one team attacks and the other defends. Players control characters known as 'agents', who all have different abilities to use during gameplay.
